name: Sortable

parameters.name: Group
parameters.description: Optional shared-group name. When set, it is emitted on the container as a data-sortable-group attribute so groups are observable in the DOM. NOTE: cross-list transfer between lists that share a group is NOT yet implemented — the attribute is reserved for that future capability and current behaviour is intra-list reordering only.

parameters.name: OnReorder
parameters.description: Raised in addition to ItemsChanged whenever an item is reordered (via drag, touch, or keyboard), carrying the moved item along with its old and new indices. Does not change the ItemsChanged contract.

parameters.name: Key
parameters.description: Optional selector that returns a stable, unique key for each item. Providing this ensures Blazor's diffing engine tracks items by identity rather than index — critical for drag-reorder to map DOM state correctly. If omitted, the item reference itself is used as the key.

events.name: OnReorder
events.description: Raised in addition to ItemsChanged whenever an item is reordered (via drag, touch, or keyboard), carrying the moved item along with its old and new indices. Does not change the ItemsChanged contract.

records.name: SortableMoved
records.signature: SortableMoved(TItem Item, int OldIndex, int NewIndex)
records.description: Payload describing a single reorder: the moved and its / within the list. Supplied to OnReorder.

examples.title: Basic Sortable List
examples.code:
<SortableList TItem="string" Items="@_tasks" ItemsChanged="@(v => _tasks = v)">
    <ItemTemplate Context="item">
        <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm">@item</Lumeo.Text>
    </ItemTemplate>
</SortableList>

examples.title: No Handle (drag entire card)
examples.code:
<SortableList TItem="string" Items="@_tasks" ItemsChanged="@(v => _tasks = v)" Handle="false">
    <ItemTemplate Context="item">
        <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm">@item</Lumeo.Text>
    </ItemTemplate>
</SortableList>

examples.title: Rich Item Template
examples.code:
<SortableList TItem="TaskItem" Items="@_tasks" ItemsChanged="@(v => _tasks = v)">
    <ItemTemplate Context="task">
        <Flex Class="items-center gap-3 w-full">
            <DynamicIcon Name="@task.Icon" Class="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
            <Stack Gap="0" Class="flex-1">
                <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm font-medium">@task.Title</Lumeo.Text>
                <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground">@task.Assignee</Lumeo.Text>
            </Stack>
            <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Secondary">@task.Priority</Badge>
        </Flex>
    </ItemTemplate>
</SortableList>

mdSummary:
# Sortable

Drag-and-drop reorderable list.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Drag & Drop
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/sortable

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Sortable | Items | `List<TItem>` | `[]` |  |
| Sortable | ItemsChanged | `EventCallback<List<TItem>>` | `` |  |
| Sortable | ItemTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| Sortable | Handle | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Sortable | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Sortable | Group | `string?` | `` | Optional shared-group name. When set, it is emitted on the container as a data-sortable-group attribute so groups are observable in the DOM. NOTE: cross-list transfer between lists that share a group is NOT yet implemented — the attribute is reserved for that future capability and current behaviour is intra-list reordering only. |
| Sortable | OnReorder | `EventCallback<SortableMoved>` | `` | Raised in addition to ItemsChanged whenever an item is reordered (via drag, touch, or keyboard), carrying the moved item along with its old and new indices. Does not change the ItemsChanged contract. |
| Sortable | Key | `Func<TItem, object>?` | `` | Optional selector that returns a stable, unique key for each item. Providing this ensures Blazor's diffing engine tracks items by identity rather than index — critical for drag-reorder to map DOM state correctly. If omitted, the item reference itself is used as the key. |
| Sortable | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Sortable | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ItemTemplate` (Sortable) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ItemsChanged` (`EventCallback<List<TItem>>`)
- `OnReorder` (`EventCallback<SortableMoved>`) — Raised in addition to ItemsChanged whenever an item is reordered (via drag, touch, or keyboard), carrying the moved item along with its old and new indices. Does not change the ItemsChanged contract.

## Sub-components
- `SortableList`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Sortable />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Sortable/SortableList.razor`
